---
title: identical-branches
description: "Detect identical if branches."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect identical if branches. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if ready { start() } else { start() }
```

## Good

```go
if ready { start() } else { wait() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only identical-branches`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
